Name: Minimum time for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in cases with immediate reject from checklist
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time until SW-Awaiting EIC Decision is performed from manuscript submission
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Percentage of total case time spent in SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and the end of the case

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision since the Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: SW-Awaiting EIC Decision Cycle Time
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and the end of the case

Name: Average ratio of time for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision to time for SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and the end of the case

Name: Average difference between time for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and time for SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and the end of the case

Name: Total time for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision compared to total time for SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision relative to minimum time for SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and the end of the case

Name: Time between SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and the subsequent SW-EIC Major Revision decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Average time for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in the scientific paper review process
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and the end of the case

Name: Average time for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision when preceded by multiple SW-Reviewer Declined activities
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined occurs

Name: Total time for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants involving Reviewer Invitation Reminders
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and the end of case where activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 occurs

Name: Time from the final SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision grouped by the number of SW-Reviewer Agreed activities
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and the end of case grouped by the last value of performer

Name: Time between SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and the first post-decision activity (e.g., SW-EIC Major Revision, RW-Initial Reviewer Selection)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Average duration of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision versus average duration of RW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting EIC Decision and the end of the case

Name: Time from SW-Awaiting EIC Decision to the next manuscript status change in the review process
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision'
